playbook.intent: Run a structured 4-week campaign that takes a shipping product to a top-3 Product Hunt launch, with measurable signup + revenue lift, then converts the spike into retained subscribers and audience.
playbook.scope: Run a structured 4-week campaign that takes a shipping product to a top-3 Product Hunt launch, with measurable signup + revenue lift, then converts the spike into retained subscribers and audience.

success-criteria.criterion: Final stage decision-gate is met and committed in writing
Every stage produces its named outputs
Cycle closes only when a written commitment exists for the next step

stage.name: Pre-launch checklist (T-4 weeks)
stage.intent: Pick the date, prep the assets.

tasks.task: Reserve the launch date (avoid major collisions)
Draft the listing copy + visuals
Line up the maker bio + comments plan

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when listing draft is reviewed by 3 outsiders.

stage.name: Audience warm-up (T-3 weeks)
stage.intent: Tell the people who already follow you.

tasks.task: Send a save-the-date to newsletter and audience
Run build-in-public posts that tease the launch
Identify 20 hunters/upvoters likely to engage

stage.name: Hunter + maker DMs (T-2 weeks)
stage.intent: Pre-load the maker comments and supporter pings.

tasks.task: DM 20-50 makers with a friendly heads-up
Pre-write the first 5 maker comments
Confirm hunter relationships

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when DMs have answered yes I will engage.

stage.name: Asset polish (T-1 week)

tasks.task: Finalize images / gif / video
Lock the tagline + first comment
Test mobile previews

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when assets are locked >=24h before launch.

stage.name: Launch day execution

tasks.task: Post at the optimal hour
Reply to every comment within minutes
Push warm channels for upvotes (without begging)

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when first 6 hours hit the target upvote pace.

stage.name: Post-launch drip (T+1 week)

tasks.task: Send a thanks + onboarding drip to new signups
Capture verbatim feedback from new users
Push a recap post to all channels

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when drip converts >=20% of new signups to active.

stage.name: Lessons + #1-of-day post-mortem
stage.intent: Lock the learnings for the next launch.

tasks.task: Compile the launch metrics
Write a post-mortem with what to repeat
Update the launch playbook with deltas

stage.decision-gate: Cycle closes when post-mortem is committed.

extra.value: {human: faion get-content product-hunt-launch-campaign-4-week-prep-to-1-of-day --format md, agent: faion get-content product-hunt-launch-campaign-4-week-prep-to-1-of-day --format context, json: faion get-content product-hunt-launch-campaign-4-week-prep-to-1-of-day --format json}
[{version: 1.0.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial v2 draft generated from F-059..063 backlog}]
